subject: Deploy and verify production
description:
Get the app publicly accessible.

Walk the repo first: read CLAUDE.md for stack and build setup.

Work:
- Choose deployment target (Vercel, Netlify, Cloudflare Pages - whatever matches the stack)
- Configure build command and output directory
- Deploy and verify all three pages load at the public URL
- Test cross-page navigation on the deployed version
- Verify instrumentation events fire in production
- Check performance targets on deployed version (LCP < 2.5s on 4G)

Write back to CLAUDE.md:
- Deployment URL
- Deployment platform and config
- Any production-specific issues found and fixed

changes: Deployed to fundforge.tomfuertes.workers.dev via Cloudflare Workers static assets
learnings: Workers static assets _redirects causes infinite loop validation error - use not_found_handling instead
wrangler.jsonc must live in app/ alongside node_modules since there is no root package.json
